title: To Her Shadow
content:
Here's to her shadow!
    May it mark the hours
    Upon the sundial of her life--in flowers!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Oliver Herford, titled "To Her Shadow", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
